machine.name: Health Services Behavioral Health Integration Outcome Stabilizer
machine.description: Health Services domain machine for behavioral health integration that monitors whether optimized delivery is producing sustained outcomes. It operationalizes the PH system transformation evaluation-plan workflow by watching evaluability, logic-model outputs, evaluation questions, selected measures, and AI-dispatchable intervention status. Output at [3431:3435] can trigger downstream agents or peer machines in the Behavioral Health Integration pathway.

metadata.author: Reality Engine
metadata.sourceGuide: Practical Guide for Building an Eval Plan for PH System Transformation, PHAB, February 2026
guideConcepts: select a topic and define the ideal state
select measures and draft an evaluation plan matrix
metadata.focusDescription: screening, crisis routing, integrated supports, and stabilization
agentActions: Dispatch public_health_nurse_agent to resolve behavioral health integration delivery risk and update the evaluation plan matrix.
Trigger optimization agent workflow for behavioral health integration using current logic-model outputs and measures.
Record sustained progress toward the ideal state for behavioral health integration and keep monitoring.
metadata.populationFocus: Community health service recipients, public health agencies, care partners, and cross-sector service networks

sensorNormalization.evaluability_readiness_norm: 0.0=no usable data, support, or capacity; 0.5=partial evaluability; 1.0=clear scope, data, resources, and interest-holder support
sensorNormalization.service_delivery_pressure_norm: 0.0=acute unmet demand or failed handoffs; 0.5=manageable pressure; 1.0=stable delivery capacity
sensorNormalization.equity_signal_norm: 0.0=large disparity or excluded population; 0.5=known gap under mitigation; 1.0=equitable reach and experience
sensorNormalization.measure_confidence_norm: 0.0=missing/low-quality measures; 0.5=partial indicator confidence; 1.0=timely, actionable, trusted measures

metadata.downstreamPattern: Output region [3431:3435] feeds peer health-services machines and AI dispatch orchestration.

sequences.name: Behavioral Health Integration Outcome Stabilizer: READY -> GAP -> CRITICAL -> URGENT_AGENT_DISPATCH

metadata.description: Escalates when an initially evaluable transformation area develops delivery pressure, equity risk, and weak measure confidence.

metadata.name: READY
metadata.description: Evaluable, resourced, equitable, and measurable baseline.

metadata.name: GAP
metadata.description: Delivery pressure and weak measurement appear while evaluability and equity signals remain visible.

metadata.name: CRITICAL
metadata.description: Transformation signal requires urgent AI dispatch and accountable follow-up.

metadata.action: Dispatch public_health_nurse_agent to resolve behavioral health integration delivery risk and update the evaluation plan matrix.

sequences.name: Behavioral Health Integration Outcome Stabilizer: OPTIMIZATION_OPPORTUNITY -> OPTIMIZE_DELIVERY

metadata.description: Fires when measures show a feasible optimization opportunity without acute crisis.

metadata.name: OPTIMIZATION_OPPORTUNITY
metadata.description: Service delivery is functioning but AI optimization can improve outcomes, equity, or efficiency.

metadata.action: Trigger optimization agent workflow for behavioral health integration using current logic-model outputs and measures.

sequences.name: Behavioral Health Integration Outcome Stabilizer: IDEAL_STATE_SIGNAL -> IDEAL_STATE_STABLE

metadata.description: Fires when the focus area shows sustained, measured progress toward the ideal state.

metadata.name: IDEAL_STATE_SIGNAL
metadata.description: Delivery is stable, measures are trusted, and the transformation area is on track.

metadata.action: Record sustained progress toward the ideal state for behavioral health integration and keep monitoring.

inputSequences.name: Escalation to urgent agent dispatch
inputSequences.description: Evaluability starts strong, then delivery and measurement gaps emerge, then the focus area reaches crisis.

inputSequences.name: Optimization opportunity
inputSequences.description: AI optimization can improve delivery before crisis conditions appear.

inputSequences.name: Stable ideal-state progress
inputSequences.description: The focus area is progressing toward the transformed ideal state.

inputSequences.name: Ready baseline without output
inputSequences.description: A single ready signal arms the escalation path but does not dispatch an agent.
